get_rules.note: Exact runtime name for project design rules.

assign_pattern.note: Only valid for the supported embedded PCB component-pattern operation; it is not general schematic pattern authoring.

validate_diff_pair.note: Exact runtime name for differential-pair validation.

analyze_controlled_impedance_nets.note: Preliminary analytical microstrip review only; not a field solver.

apply_panelization_plan.note: Applies official DipTrace panel parameters directly; there is no separate plan-apply split.

limitations.calculate_impedance: Verified analytical microstrip estimate only; distinguish it from field-solver or fabricator results.
limitations.run_thermal_review: Metadata and heuristic review profile, not CFD or thermal simulation.
limitations.export_fabrication_outputs: Creates a generic review manifest, not Gerber, NC Drill, ODB++, IPC-2581 or a fabrication ZIP.
limitations.export_assembly_outputs: Creates generic BOM and placement artifacts; vendor CPL transforms are not guaranteed.
limitations.route_diff_pair: Bounded coupled route; no independent post-route tuning engine.
limitations.generate_placement_candidates: Bounded local candidates, not global placement.
limitations.sync_schematic_to_pcb: Additive synchronization only; multi-part components need explicit pin-to-pad mappings and extra PCB objects/traces are preserved.
limitations.get_findings: Requires a report_id returned by a review; use the document findings resource for aggregate history.
limitations.get_job_status: Requires a jobid and cannot discover a job implicitly.

assign_pattern.note: set_component_pattern is not a verified general schematic authoring operation.

add_via.note: The current add_via primitive inserts a via on an existing trace and cannot safely create a standalone net-assigned stitching via.

export_fabrication_outputs.note: The existing tool returns a generic manifest, not the requested native fabrication package.

run_manufacturing_review.note: The existing review is generic; a versioned fabricator profile remains a separate dependency.

export_assembly_outputs.note: Use only for generic artifacts; block a vendor-ready CPL claim without a verified transform adapter.

run_assembly_review.note: The existing review is generic; a versioned assembler process profile remains a separate dependency.

run_manufacturing_geometry_check.note: Use the generic geometry check only as a bounded baseline, not as a versioned fabricator profile.

export_fabrication_outputs.note: Generic manifest inspection is available; native-file generation and verification are separate dependencies.

run_assembly_review.note: Use the generic review only as a bounded baseline, not as a versioned assembler process profile.

set_component_fields.note: Do not mutate component fields in the default read-only selection workflow; sourcing data needs a timestamped adapter.
